headline: Broadcom (AVGO) Launches $35 Billion AI Platform With Apollo Blackstone And Anthropic
summary: Broadcom, Apollo and Blackstone have launched the AI XPV Platform to support over 20 gigawatts of AI compute capacity through 2028. The initiative includes an initial $35b tranche focused on large scale deployment of Anthropic’s compute infrastructure. The platform is built around Broadcom’s XPUs and networking products, targeting hyperscale AI data centers. For investors tracking NasdaqGS:AVGO, this move adds a fresh operational layer to the Broadcom story that goes beyond recent share...

headline: Big Tech's $2.7 trillion AI bill comes due: Chart of the Day
summary: The “Magnificent Seven” plus Broadcom and Oracle have lost roughly $2.7 trillion in market value in June, according to Yahoo Finance analysis, as investors take a harder look at the companies funding the AI build-out.

content.title: Big Tech's $2.7 trillion AI bill comes due: Chart of the Day

headline: Broadcom rises 3% on OpenAI custom "Jalapeño" chip reveal
summary: Investing.com -- Broadcom (NASDAQ:AVGO) shares jumped 3.4% Wednesday morning following the unveiling of "Jalapeño," a custom AI chip developed in partnership with OpenAI. Billed as OpenAI’s first "Intelligence Processor," the custom accelerator was designed specifically for large language model (LLM) inference and moved from design to production in just nine months. The chip marks OpenAI’s official expansion into proprietary hardware as part of its full-stack infrastructure strategy. Built from

headline: Latest News In AI Chips - Menlo Ventures Secures $3 Billion For AI Investment Expansion
summary: In a significant move for the AI chip industry, Menlo Ventures has announced securing $3 billion in new capital dedicated to investing in promising AI companies at various stages of development. This investment is poised to support advancements across the AI stack, from foundational infrastructure to AI-native applications in sectors such as enterprise, healthcare, and consumer markets.
